title: Code Review
description: Review a pasted code diff and produce concrete findings.

prompts.name: review_diff
prompts.title: Review Diff
prompts.description: Find correctness, maintainability, and test gaps in a pasted diff.
prompts.template:
请审查下面的代码改动。优先列出明确 bug、行为回归、缺失测试和可维护性风险。必要时调用 demo MCP tool 把结论整理成 checklist。

{{diff}}

arguments.name: diff
arguments.description: 需要审查的代码 diff 或片段。
